deep_dive.title: Dec-MARVEL: Decentralized Multi-Agent Exploration without Communication under Budget Constraints
deep_dive.abstract: Multi-UAV exploration is often constrained by unreliable communication, limited field-of-view sensing (e.g., lightweight onboard camera), and finite travel budgets that require each robot to reserve enough budget to return to its base. We present Dec-MARVEL, a decentralized budget-aware exploration framework for communication-free teams with directional sensing. Rather than exchanging maps, goals, or messages, each robot coordinates through its incidental observations: any teammate trajectory within its field of view serves as a coordination signal. A graph-attention actor fuses local frontier geometry, teammate motion, and budget features to select return-feasible waypoint-heading actions. The actor is trained with phase-conditioned critics, a training-only task-oriented privileged critic, and a mixture-based budget curriculum. Across 900 held-out trials spanning three team sizes (2, 4, 8 robots) and three travel budgets (720, 800, 1024 meters) against four baselines, Dec-MARVEL achieves the highest or tied-highest exploration rate and lowest sensing overlap across all nine team-size budget configurations. Under our tightest 720m budget, it reaches 53%, 94%, and 100% success for 2, 4, and 8 robots, versus 37%, 83%, and 99% for the strongest baseline. Physical-robot experiments demonstrate successful sim-to-real transfer and real-world deployment of Dec-MARVEL.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: decentralized multi-UAV exploration with coordination through observations, akin to encirclement
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 去中心化多无人机探索，通过观测协调，类似于围捕
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 去中心化多无人机探索，通过观测协调，类似于围捕
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 去中心化多无人机探索，通过观测协调，类似于围捕
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Dec-MARVEL enables decentralized multi-UAV exploration without communication, coordinating through incidental observations, directly applicable to multi-UAV encirclement.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 在多无人机探索任务中，通信不可靠和视角有限是常见挑战。该论文提出Dec-MARVEL，一种去中心化的预算感知探索框架，无需通信即可通过观测队友轨迹进行协调。使用图注意力actor融合局部前沿几何、队友运动和预算特征选择动作。实验表明该方法在有限预算下有效，其协调机制可直接用于多无人机协同围捕。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 在多无人机探索任务中，通信不可靠和视角有限是常见挑战。该论文提出Dec-MARVEL，一种去中心化的预算感知探索框架，无需通信即可通过观测队友轨迹进行协调。使用图注意力actor融合局部前沿几何、队友运动和预算特征选择动作。实验表明该方法在有限预算下有效，其协调机制可直接用于多无人机协同围捕。

quick_skim.title: Last-Meter Precision Navigation for UAVs: A Diffusion-Refined Aerial Visual Servoing Approach
quick_skim.abstract: In this work, we study the last-meter precision navigation for UAVs, e.g., autonomously reaching a target within the final 10 meters using monocular vision. This task is challenging due to scale ambiguity, rotation discontinuities, and the need for fine-grained spatial reasoning. Existing methods often fail under large viewpoint changes or lack generalization to unseen environments. To this end, we propose DreamNav, a coarse-to-fine diffusion-refined aerial visual servoing framework. In the first coarse-estimation stage, a robust regression policy employs a trigonometric parameterization to predict rotation by jointly modeling sine and cosine components, effectively mitigating optimization instabilities caused by angular periodicity. Given this coarse estimate, the second diffusion-refined stage utilizes a pre-trained world model to simulate future visual observations for candidate actions, selecting the trajectory that minimizes visual discrepancy with the target through a process of visual imagination. To support rigorous evaluation, we contribute PairUAV, a large-scale benchmark comprising 4.8 million image pairs across 72 scenes, curated from the University-1652 dataset. Extensive experiments show DreamNav outperforms strong visual servoing and foundation model baselines in accuracy and generalization, with zero-shot transfer to unseen scenes.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: UAV precise navigation to target applicable for interception tasks
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 无人机精确导航至目标，可用于拦截任务
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 无人机精确导航至目标，可用于拦截任务
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 无人机精确导航至目标，可用于拦截任务
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes DreamNav, a coarse-to-fine diffusion-refined aerial visual servoing framework for last-meter precision UAV navigation toward a target, addressing scale and rotation challenges. Potentially useful for single UAV interception.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对无人机在最后10米内精确到达目标的难题，本文提出DreamNav框架，结合粗估计与扩散精化视觉伺服，通过三角参数化预测旋转，解决了视觉导航中的尺度模糊和旋转不连续问题。实验表明该方法在多种视角变化下仍能保持高精度，为单无人机拦截中的精确追踪提供了可行的技术支撑。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对无人机在最后10米内精确到达目标的难题，本文提出DreamNav框架，结合粗估计与扩散精化视觉伺服，通过三角参数化预测旋转，解决了视觉导航中的尺度模糊和旋转不连续问题。实验表明该方法在多种视角变化下仍能保持高精度，为单无人机拦截中的精确追踪提供了可行的技术支撑。
